title: HCP Humanitarian Case — Reference Schema
description: Reference machine-readable structure for a locally generated Humanitarian Case based on HCP-0015 Result Presentation Model. Humanitarian Cases are local interpretation objects and must never be synchronized between HCP Nodes.

case_id.description: Local identifier of the Humanitarian Case. It identifies only this implementation-specific interpretation and never identifies a Subject.

source_query_id.description: Optional local identifier of the Query that contributed to generation of the Humanitarian Case.

humanitarian_summary.description: Concise human-readable summary of the current humanitarian interpretation. It must not be presented as verified fact.

related_records.description: References to immutable Humanitarian Records contributing evidence to this local interpretation.

humanitarian_timeline.description: Optional chronological organization of related humanitarian observations. The timeline is local and does not represent verified history.

reported_location.description: Location associated with the current local humanitarian interpretation.

score.description: Implementation-specific estimation of humanitarian compatibility. HCP does not prescribe a numerical range or scoring methodology.

evidence_level.description: Optional implementation-specific human-readable classification of evidence strength.

supporting_evidence.description: Evidence that increases confidence in the humanitarian interpretation.

conflicting_evidence.description: Evidence that reduces confidence or introduces uncertainty.

reasoning.description: Optional human-readable explanation summarizing why the related observations appear compatible.

type.description: Semantic category of the humanitarian evidence.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of how the evidence affects the humanitarian interpretation.

related_record_ids.description: Optional Humanitarian Record UUIDs associated with this evidence.

record_id.description: UUID of an immutable Humanitarian Record contributing evidence to the Humanitarian Case.

source.description: Optional human-readable description of the reporting source.

status.description: Local verification status of the Humanitarian Case.

message.description: Human-readable statement explaining that the Humanitarian Case is a local interpretation and may require direct human verification.

verified_by.description: Optional local description of the person or organization that performed human verification.
